Variables.Name: NumFrames
Variables.Description: Number of raw frames in this sequence (not used by engine - just for informational purposes).

Variables.Name: TrackToSkeletonMapTable
Variables.Description:
In the future, maybe keeping RawAnimSequenceTrack + TrackMap as one would be good idea to avoid inconsistent array size
	  TrackToSkeletonMapTable(i) should contains  track mapping data for RawAnimationData(i).

Variables.Name: RefPoseType
Variables.Description: Additive refrerence pose type. Refer above enum type

Variables.Name: RefPoseSeq
Variables.Description: Additive reference animation if it's relevant - i.e. AnimScaled or AnimFrame

Variables.Name: RefFrameIndex
Variables.Description: Additve reference frame if RefPoseType == AnimFrame

Variables.Name: EncodingPkgVersion
Variables.Description: The version of the global encoding package used at the time of import

Variables.Name: RetargetSource
Variables.Description: Base pose to use when retargeting

Variables.Name: Interpolation
Variables.Description: This defines how values between keys are calculated

Variables.Name: bEnableRootMotion
Variables.Description: If this is on, it will allow extracting of root motion

Variables.Name: RootMotionRootLock
Variables.Description: Root Bone will be locked to that position when extracting root motion.

Variables.Name: bForceRootLock
Variables.Description: Force Root Bone Lock even if Root Motion is not enabled

Variables.Name: bRootMotionSettingsCopiedFromMontage
Variables.Description: Have we copied root motion settings from an owning montage

Variables.Name: CurveForRootPosition
Variables.Description: 当在对Sequence 本身进行构造Root 位置曲线后才会被携带的三个曲线和新的Sequence
